function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system and read relevant finance schema, then read nested finance rulebooks before using purchase records. Kept finance answer exact and auditable.
function.outcome_justification: The two read purchase records for counterparty 深圳市海云电子 are 50_finance/purchases/2025_12_05__eur_000044__bill__house_mesh_esp32_order.md with total_eur 44 and 50_finance/purchases/2026_03_07__eur_000022__bill__house_mesh_esp32_topup.md with total_eur 22; both contain relay modules priced at 6. Their totals sum to 66.
